articles.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says - BBC
articles.description: The allegations come as Chinese AI companies are facing increased US government scrutiny.
articles.content: The BBC has contacted Moonshot, the Chinese embassy in Washington, Anthropic, the White House, and Nvidia for comment.

articles.title: OpenAI hacking incident exposes mounting risks in AI arms race - Financial Times
articles.description: Increasing use of aggressive training techniques sharpens threat of bad behaviour by leading models
